subcodes.first_line: One day, as I sat in contemplation, bewildered by the divine Cause and by that which had been made manifest in the land of Káf and Rá [3.5s]... ...My God, Thou Whom I adore and worship, Who art Most Powerful! I testify that no description by any created thing
subcodes.first_line_orig: یومی از ایام نشسته بودم در امر الهی متحیر و در آنچه در ارض کاف و را ظاهر شده
subcodes.subjects: @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @Word of God and human limitations, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @proofs of the Manifestations of God
